title: RoutineStepCommon
description: Fields shared by every routine step type. Step-specific schemas allOf-merge this with their own required fields.

id.description: Unique within the routine. Lowercase alpha + digits + underscore. Used as the lookup key for steps.<id>.json downstream.

when.description: JS expression evaluated in the quickjs sandbox against the run context. If the expression is falsy, the step is skipped (status='skipped').

on_failure.description: abort: stop the run; continue: log + go to next step; retry: per `retry` policy.

timeout_secs.description: Per-step wall clock. Default 60 for non-agent steps, 600 for agent steps. Hard-capped by routine-level budget.max_duration_secs.
